## Summary

Fixes the "lost cost history" issue. The `job_costs` table was only created on June 3 — evaluations before that have no cost data. This PR adds cumulative all-time tracking and a backfill mechanism to estimate costs for untracked historical evaluation jobs.

## Scope

**What this touches:**
- `lib/admin/costops.ts` — Added `allTimeTotalCents`, `totalEvaluationJobs`, `untrackedJobs` to summary; added `backfillHistoricalCosts()` function
- `app/admin/costs/page.tsx` — Added "All-Time Total" KPI card (highlighted, first position), "Jobs Tracked" shows tracked/total ratio, backfill button
- `app/api/admin/costs/backfill/route.ts` — New POST endpoint for admin backfill

**What it does NOT touch:**
- Evaluation pipeline, pricing, UI outside admin costs page

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

- Backfill uses average cost per evaluation from existing tracked data to estimate untracked jobs. Marked as `phase="backfill_estimate"` so estimated vs real costs are distinguishable.
- Safe to call multiple times — skips jobs that already have cost entries.

---

No-Pipeline-Impact: Confirmed — admin dashboard only, no evaluation pipeline changes
